---
title: "Our Team"
page-layout: full
toc: false

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# The team page is built from TWO "listings". A listing automatically scans a
# folder and turns each member file into a card.
#
# We split current members from alumni BY FOLDER (one folder per group):
#   - current-members -> members/current/*.qmd
#   - alumni-members  -> members/alumni/*.qmd
# Each member file lives in exactly ONE of these folders, so the two grids
# never overlap. To retire someone, move their .qmd from current/ to alumni/.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
listing:
  - id: current-members
    contents: "members/current/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 4            # smaller cards -> 8 current members fit in 2 rows
    # No image-height: the portraits are square-cropped and theme.scss renders
    # the card image 1:1 (see ".quarto-grid-item .card-img-top"). A fixed height
    # here would letterbox them back into short cards.
    fields: [image, title, subtitle]
    image-placeholder: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
    sort: "weight asc"         # order by the `weight:` field (PI first, etc.)
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false

  - id: alumni-members
    contents: "members/alumni/*.qmd"
    type: table              # compact text list, no photos
    fields: [title, details]  # `details` is a hand-written one-line summary per person
    field-display-names:
      title: "Name"
      details: "Details"
    sort: "sort_key desc"     # most recent departure first; sort_key: 0 = unknown, sorts last
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

We are an interdisciplinary group working at the interface of ecology, Earth
system science, and remote sensing.

**Join us!** We welcome undergraduate researchers, prospective graduate students,
and postdocs. Reach out to [Xiangtao](mailto:xx286@cornell.edu) if our work
resonates with you.


## Current members

::: {#current-members}
:::


## Alumni

::: {#alumni-members}
:::
